routes._comment: Homepage at /ghiseul/public/. The highest-traffic Romanian gov site (per SITES_COVERAGE.md sec 3.1). Bootstrap 5 + custom CSS, served behind Cloudflare's managed challenge — direct curl returns the JS challenge HTML, so live inspection done via Playwright. Stable hooks: #home-main (page main), #navbar (top nav), #title_auth (hero block), #login_form, #login (auth form), #username/#passwordT/#passwordP (input ids), #nrUsers (counter), #divCookie (cookie banner). Two flow split per task spec: anonymous payment buttons in main vs account-based login form on the right. Selector source: live inspection of https://www.ghiseul.ro/ghiseul/public/ on 2026-05-02.

extract._comment: Hero title — the main h1 inside #title_auth. The page has multiple empty <h1>s used for SEO scaffolding; we want the first non-empty one.
Top navigation — nav.navbar holds the site-wide menu (Acasa, Institutii inrolate, Legislatie, Intrebari frecvente, Contact).
Account-based login form — #login is the stable id. Renderer surfaces the form fields by id/name (kept untouched per invariant 2 — read-only in v0.1).
Login form: username input.
Login form: PIN field (passwordT).
Login form: password field (passwordP). Toggle eye icon controlled by #togglePassword.

Anonymous-flow CTAs — every primary action card uses class "btn-link p-0" inside #home-main and points to a /ghiseul/public/<flow> URL. Examples: solicită date de acces, plătește amenzi, plătește fără autentificare, taxă judiciară de timbru, contravaloare pașaport, permise auto, plăcuțe, parcare, asigurare locuinței.

Section headings — every CTA card group has an <h3>. There are 8 on the homepage (Solicitare date de acces, Plata amenzi, Plata fara autentificare, Rovinieta, Titluri de stat, Plata parcare, Pool-ul de Asigurare, etc.).
Live counter — #nrUsers shows the current registered-user count. Useful for the journalist persona that surfaces ops metrics.
Cookie consent — #divCookie is the bespoke cookie banner. Rule pack does NOT render its own — the consent module proxies to source-page accept buttons (per CLAUDE.md, SITES_COVERAGE.md Appendix A).

pensioner._comment: Pensioner — anonymous flow only. The login form is overwhelming. Surface anonymous CTA cards as the primary tap targets.

standard._comment: Standard — both flows visible side by side. This is the default ghiseul.ro experience cleaned up.

pro._comment: Pro persona (accountant / repeat user) — account flow first. Login form front and centre, anonymous flow secondary.

journalist._comment: Journalist — show counter (ops metric), cards (service catalogue), titles. De-emphasize the login form.

routes._comment: Anonymous payment flow at /ghiseul/public/taxe — the pay-without-an-account form. Backed by ASP-style form #formTaxe with stable input ids: #judet, #tip_institutie, #institutie, #tipPers, #labelNumeTaxa, #pv_serie, #pv_nr, #data, #dataComunicarii, #pvFile. Every visible field has a stable id from the developer (not framework-generated). Selector source: live inspection of https://www.ghiseul.ro/ghiseul/public/taxe on 2026-05-02 via Playwright.

extract._comment: Page title — h1.page-title is the page heading ("Plata fara autentificare").
Payment form root — #formTaxe is the stable form id, posts to /ghiseul/public/plata/plata-taxe.
Region selector — #judet is the county dropdown.
Institution-type selector — #tip_institutie filters institutions by category.
Specific institution selector — #institutie is populated based on judet + tip_institutie.
Person type — #tipPers (PF / PJ).
Tax/fine selection trigger — #alege-taxa opens a modal listing available tax types per institution.
Fine details: process verbal serie + numar (only visible when paying a fine). Stable ids #pv_serie / #pv_nr.
Fine details: process verbal numar.
Top navigation — same site-wide menu.

pensioner._comment: Pensioner — strip nav, focus form. One field per visible row. Hide fine-detail fields unless they become relevant.

pro._comment: Pro persona — dense form with all fields shown including fine details and primary nav.
